name: ai-harness-maintainer
description: Automates recurring research, maintenance, implementation, and visual verification for AI harness codebases.

interface.shortDescription: Recurring codebase maintenance for AI harnesses.
interface.longDescription: Researches AI harness updates, applies scoped code changes, runs tests, verifies frontend or workflow behavior with screenshots when available, and reports evidence from each recurring maintenance pass.
defaultPrompt: Run an AI harness maintenance pass on this repo.
Research new harness patterns and patch this codebase.
Verify the harness UI with screenshots after changes.
